notes: Curated surf-shop board knowledge. Stock claims must still come from verified regional inventory.

boards.reputationSummary: A forgiving step-down from the Ghost that still feels like a proper shortboard.
Famous for easy paddle, speed and versatility rather than pure high-performance precision.
A user-friendly fish with easy speed and flow in small to average waves.
A refined fish-style board with more performance and range than a very traditional keel fish.

boards.shortPosition: a cult performance twin and point-break fish
boards.reputationSummary: A refined twin that runs fast down the line and feels more performance-led than a cruisy fish.
A performance twin that sits closer to a refined shortboard than a cruisy retro fish.

boards.shortPosition: a refined twin-pin for clean lines
boards.reputationSummary: A sleek twin-pin style board for fast, smooth lines in better waves.

boards.shortPosition: a performance fish and small-wave speed board
boards.reputationSummary: A JS twin built to generate speed while keeping a more performance-oriented feel than a cruisy fish.
A proper performance shortboard lane, not the easiest board in weak surf.
A daily shortboard for surfers who want performance with more everyday usability.
A fast, responsive performance board with more everyday range than a pure pro-only blade.
A user-friendlier everyday version of the Happy lane with a strong shortboard feel.
A fast, flatter-rockered performance board with more glide and trim than a pure modern shortboard.
A versatile board with more forgiveness and paddle help than sharper performance shortboards.
A user-friendly, wider-range board rather than a sharp performance daily driver.
A respected Christenson fish-style board for speed, trim and clean point-break lines.
